name: E-12 per-rule per-file cache: --no-cache trumps --cache so no cache file is written
command: printf 'x\n' > in.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule g-ts-001 --in in.txt --cache --cache-location cache.json --no-cache 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ ! -f cache.json ] && echo skipped 1>&2
